channel.title: Projects on Sharad Raj
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Sharad Raj

item.title: Agentic RAG Pipeline
item.description:
Overview

The Agentic RAG Pipeline is a production-ready system for building tool-using agents with retrieval-augmented generation capabilities. It provides a flexible framework for creating autonomous agents that can reason, retrieve information, and take actions.

item.title: Adarsh Champawat Geospatial Dashboard
item.description:
Overview

The Adarsh Champawat Geospatial Dashboard is a comprehensive Web GIS application designed for district-level spatial analysis and decision support. Developed for Champawat District in Uttarakhand, India, the dashboard integrates advanced geospatial analysis with AI/ML capabilities.
